title: Update commands section to a table and add missing commands
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

I find scanning through a table of commands to be easier to search on the eyes than the old style that we had.  Also a number of commands were not listed and I added them to the table.  I think that once this is in place the manpages in the left column will turn into direct links.  If not, I'll play with it to make it so.

comments.body: Travis CI was green, all others failed but none of them left an error message.
I don't get the links for free.  I've added them and hope the test runs this time or at least leaves behind an error.
Happy green buttons and links included.

@rh-atomic-bot retry
I think @baude added a flaky test to our unit tests. Seems to segfault a good percentage of the time.
This is just a docs change, so I'm going to manually merge to avoid our flakes
